user.title: Configure Message Queue
user.description: Set up the message queue integration with default settings. You can add queues after setup.

data_description.rotation_interval: How often to check for expired messages.
data_description.default_show_seconds: How long messages display if no duration is specified.

data_description.queue_name: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only (e.g., living_room_screen).

remove_queue.title: Remove Queue
remove_queue.description: Select a queue to remove. Messages in the queue will be lost.

data_description.rotation_interval: How often to check for expired messages.
data_description.default_show_seconds: How long messages display if no duration is specified.

error.invalid_name: Invalid name. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Must start with a letter.
error.duplicate_name: A queue with this name already exists.
